description_long: This is a single-story residential house with a large, sloped hip roof and a covered front patio area supported by columns. The front features a wide, paved area leading to the main entrance, which is sheltered by the roof extension. There is a visible outdoor dining set under the patio, suggesting a space for outdoor living. The house has a simple, rectangular footprint with minimal decorative elements, and the exterior walls are smooth and painted in a light color. Windows are arranged in a practical, asymmetrical pattern, with several grouped together on one side. The roof includes a small, black chimney or vent structure, adding a functional detail to the otherwise clean lines.
description: A single-story house with a large hip roof, covered patio, and asymmetrical window arrangement. The exterior is simple and modern, with a paved front area and outdoor dining space.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered patio, main entrance, outdoor dining set, and paved area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the sloped roof and the small black chimney or vent on top.
description_view_2: Rear view with minimal visible features, mostly showing the plain back wall and roof.
description_view_3: Side view with a clear look at the patio area, columns, and roof structure.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered entry with a wide patio, supported by columns, and a simple main door under a roof overhang.
